title: Michael B. Jordan's 2026 Oscar Win for Sinners
text: Michael B. Jordan claimed the Best Actor award at the 98th Academy Awards for his dual role as twins Smoke and Stack in director Ryan Coogler's horror film Sinners. The win prompted an extended standing ovation from the ceremony attendees. In his acceptance remarks, Jordan acknowledged the historic significance of his achievement, stating: To be amongst those giants, amongst those greats, amongst my ancestors, amongst my gods. He expressed gratitude to supporters, saying: I'm going to keep stepping up. I'm going to keep being the best version of myself I can be. Jordan competed against Timothée Chalamet, Leonardo DiCaprio, Ethan Hawke, and Wagner Moura in the category. The achievement marks a milestone in his career trajectory, which began with television work on All My Children before transitioning to acclaimed film roles in productions like Fruitvale Station, Creed, and Black Panther.
